revisedPrompt:
Create a production-ready 2D sprite sheet with EXACTLY SIX isolated full-body side-profile sprites, arranged as a precise clean 3-column × 2-row grid on ONE perfectly uniform solid bright-magenta chroma-key background. No panel lines, borders, dividers, guides, scenery, ground, cast shadows, gradients, texture, text, numbers, UI, labels, logos, watermark, or branding.

Visual style: wholly original whimsical fantasy character design, using the supplied reference only as broad inspiration for clean hand-drawn dark contours, flat pastel color fills, charming slight line imperfections, and appealing storybook-game character energy. Do NOT copy any figure, costume, prop, silhouette, or composition from the reference. Established EX-0007 palette only: dark blue-gray outlines, aqua, leaf green, warm yellow, and coral, plus minimal light neutral skin tones if necessary. Crisp readable silhouettes and animation-ready consistency.

TOP ROW — same young ground courier in all three cells, identical design, proportions, clothing, colors, scale, side-profile orientation, and baseline. The courier is a wholly original youthful human adventurer with a compact courier satchel, practical whimsical travel outfit, short windswept hair, light boots, and small parcel details. All three sprites face RIGHT and show three consecutive distinct running poses that form a readable seamless loop: frame 1 contact/stride, frame 2 passing/compression, frame 3 airborne/opposite stride. Full body visible in every frame, no cropped parts, generous clear padding around each sprite.

BOTTOM ROW — same young HUMAN flying rival in all three cells, identical design, proportions, clothing, colors, scale, side-profile orientation, and flight baseline. The rival uses ONE compact handmade fantasy glider integrated consistently in every frame: a small original pedal-and-handle contraption with leaf-like cloth wings, simple wooden spars, and whimsical handcrafted mechanics; clearly a glider, not an animal and not a vehicle copied from any existing property. All three sprites face RIGHT and show three consecutive distinct flight poses forming a readable seamless loop: frame 1 wings slightly raised/body extended, frame 2 wings level/body compressed, frame 3 wings slightly lowered/body recovering. The human rider and entire glider must be fully visible in every cell, no cropped parts, generous clear padding.

Layout requirements are strict: exactly six sprites total; each confined visually to its implied cell; three equally spaced columns and two equally spaced rows; top-row courier frames at identical scale and foot baseline; bottom-row rival/glider frames at identical scale and flight baseline; no overlap between cells; nothing else anywhere in the image. Flat solid bright magenta must fill every background pixel.
prompt: Create one production sprite sheet for the EX-0007 visual redesign requested by the user. Use the supplied image only as broad visual inspiration for clean hand-drawn dark contours, flat pastel color, charming imperfections, and whimsical character appeal; create wholly original characters and do not copy its figures or composition. Arrange exactly six isolated full-body side-profile sprites in a clean 3-column by 2-row grid on one perfectly uniform solid bright-magenta background, with no panel lines. Top row: the same young ground courier in three consecutive right-facing running poses that form a readable loop. Bottom row: the same young human flying rival in three consecutive right-facing flight poses using one compact handmade fantasy glider, also forming a readable loop. Keep each character identical across their three frames, at identical scale and baseline, fully inside its cell with generous clear padding. Use the established EX-0007 palette: dark blue-gray outlines, aqua, leaf green, warm yellow, and coral. No gradients or shadows on the magenta background, no scenery, ground, text, numbers, UI, labels, logos, watermark, or branding.
